title: gcp-sm: network errors should be Unavailable not Backend
description: In gcp-sm both get() and put() map reqwest network-level send() errors to SecretError::Backend. These are transient failures (timeout, DNS, connection refused) that may succeed on retry — they should be SecretError::Unavailable, matching the pattern already applied to doppler in a previous fix. Same issue: 5xx responses in get() and put() fall through to the catch-all Backend arm instead of Unavailable.
